title: Lesson 8 Overview
subtitle: Listen to the lesson explained in English

transcript.en: Four things: useful **date words**, the **particle + article** trick, the **map of Malta**, and the must-see **interesting places**. Let's go!
How to write a date in Maltese:
Day-of-week, then the number, then **ta'** (of), then the month, then year. 🎯
Plus a handful of really useful date words:
**The day before yesterday** — say that one slowly! 😅
Remember the 11 particles from lesson 7? When they bump into the article **l-** ('the'), they **fuse into one word**.
Real life: 'I went into the garden':

Yep. Remember sun consonants from Lesson 1? **The L assimilates here too.** Sal- before dar becomes sad-. Same trick — when the next word starts with ċ, d, n, r, s, t, x, ż, or z, the L copies that letter.
fil- + xemx → fix-xemx (in the sun). ġol- + sodda → ġos-sodda (in the bed). 💥
Also — when followed by a vowel, h, or għ, the particles **bi** and **fi** shorten:
Apostrophe instead of a vowel. Cleaner, faster, more natural. 🎯
Quick geography. **Malta is three islands** in the Mediterranean Sea. 🌊
1️⃣ Malta — biggest. Where most people live. Capital:
2️⃣ Gozo — smaller, more rural. Capital is called Victoria, also known as:
3️⃣ Comino — tiny island, famous for the Blue Lagoon.
Malta is divided into regions. North:
Plus the harbours and Gozo. The lesson lists the major localities in each — Sliema, Mdina, Birkirkara, Marsaxlokk, plenty more. 🏘️
Tourist hits and local favourites. Quick tour:
The capital — full of history, museums and stunning architecture. St John's Cathedral. Manoel Theatre. Fort St Elmo. ✨
Mdina — the **Silent City**. Was Malta's capital before Valletta, until 1530.
The Three Cities — fortified harbour towns: Senglea, Vittoriosa, and Cospicua.
Comino's **Blue Lagoon** — crystal-clear waters, perfect for swimming. 🐠
**Dingli Cliffs** — the highest cliffs in Malta. Sunset spot. 🌅
A pilgrimage church in Gozo. People leave gifts to give thanks for miracles. ⛪
Date words. Particle fusion. Map. Places. That's lesson 8.
Tap a section and start drilling. You're flying. 💪
